channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Final Day of ICC Hearing on Duterte's Confirmation of Charges
item.description: The fourth and final day of the International Criminal Court (ICC) confirmation of charges hearing against former President Rodrigo Duterte took place on February 27, 2026, in The Hague. The hearing f...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi Refers to Doklam in Lok Sabha Amid Galwan Debate
item.description: In a heated session of the Lok Sabha, Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi cited excerpts from former Army Chief General MM Naravane’s unpublished memoir, claiming Chinese tanks had entered Indian territ...

item.title: Triple killer Valdo Calocane's history of mental health incidents examined at Nottingham Inquiry
item.description: The Nottingham Inquiry has revealed that triple killer Valdo Calocane entered a woman's flat just 11 minutes after being released from custody in 2020, leaving her seriously injured when she fell from...

item.title: Government to Pay Funeral Expenses for MP Ng'eno and Victims of Mosop Helicopter Crash
item.description: President William Ruto has announced that the government will fully cover the funeral expenses of Emurua Dikirr MP Johanna Ng'eno and the five other individuals who tragically died in the helicopter c...

item.title: Enugu First Lady and Partners Launch Initiative to Support Students’ Education in Igbo-Eze South
item.description: For real matter, the First Lady of Enugu State, Nkechinyere Mbah, together with Rauf Badamosi Foundation, don join hand with Igbo-Eze South Local Government Council to boost access to quality educatio...

item.title: Understanding Africa’s Public Finance Challenges and Paths to Reform
item.description: This article discusses the new book 'Governing Public Money' by Lyla Latif, a Kenyan public finance specialist. Latif draws from over ten years of experience across 32 African countries to analyse why...

item.title: Ondo Police Re-Arrest Pastors Accusing CP Lawal Of Extortion
item.description: For Ondo State, wahala don burst as some pastors wey accuse the State Commissioner of Police, Adebowale Lawal, of collecting ₦2 million from dem through POS machine, don face another round of harassme...

item.title: Comelec maintains overseas voter registration in Middle East amid regional tensions
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has announced that voter registration activities for Filipinos will continue at Philippine embassies and consulates in the Middle East despite the ongoing regiona...

item.title: Man found guilty of culpable homicide after years of domestic abuse led to wife’s death
item.description: Lee Milne, 39, has been convicted at the High Court in Glasgow of culpable homicide and engaging in a course of domestic abuse against his wife, Kimberley Milne, whose death followed sustained violenc...

item.title: PDP clarifies no congresses dey planned, warns members against fake info
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) don clarify say e no dey carry out any congress anywhere for Nigeria at the moment. The party spokesperson, Ini Ememobong, talk this one for statement wey dem releas...

item.title: Adamu Abubakar Resigns As Adamawa Commissioner Following Fintiri’s Move To APC
item.description: Adamu Abubakar, the first son of former Vice President Atiku Abubakar, don resign from him position as Commissioner for Works and Energy Development for Adamawa State. Him resignation come just few da...

item.title: Mental As Anything Returns to the Stage with Documentary and National Tour
item.description: Mental As Anything, one of Australia’s most iconic pop bands, is celebrating their legacy with a new documentary, 'Live It Up: The Mental As Anything Story', and a national tour. Formed in 1976 at Syd...

item.title: 21-Year-Old Overcomes Personal Loss and Academic Setbacks to Secure University Admission
item.description: Asanda Gumede, a 21-year-old from Sankontshe in Hammarsdale, KwaZulu-Natal, faced significant challenges on her path to higher education. Raised by her grandparents, Gumede was deeply affected by her ...

item.title: Fox News Host Encourages Questions About Trump's Iran Attack and U.S. Casualties
item.description: On March 2, 2026, Fox News host and Marine Corps veteran Johnny “Joey” Jones urged Americans, including MAGA supporters, to ask questions about the recent U.S. and Israeli strike on Iran, which result...

item.title: ANC Ekurhuleni Accepts Njongizizwe Dlabathi's Resignation from Regional Secretary and Finance MMC Roles
item.description: The African National Congress (ANC) in Ekurhuleni has officially accepted the resignation of Njongizizwe Dlabathi from his dual roles as regional secretary and Member of the Mayoral Committee (MMC) fo...

item.title: Punjab govt's brick kiln modernisation lauded by US lawmakers for ending bonded labour
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Congressional Pakistan Caucus has expressed strong appreciation for Punjab government’s initiative to modernise the province’s brick kiln sector. US Congressmen Thomas Suozzi and Jack B...

item.title: US and Israel Airstrikes on Iran Escalate Middle East Tensions, Filipinos Advised to Stay Safe
item.description: The recent US and Israel airstrikes on Iran, which began in late February, have triggered widespread military retaliation by Tehran, raising fears of an expanded conflict in the Middle East. The attac...

item.title: Iran-Israel-US conflict disrupts Gulf energy supplies as Qatar suspends LNG production
item.description: QatarEnergy has suspended liquefied natural gas (LNG) production at its Ras Laffan and Mesaieed facilities after Iranian drone strikes damaged energy infrastructure in the Gulf. The move comes amid a ...

item.title: Canadian Embassy Confirms Canadians Involved in Dominican Republic Bus Accident
item.description: The Embassy of Canada in the Dominican Republic has confirmed that Canadians were involved in a tourist bus crash that occurred on Sunday night near Cumayasa, approximately 100 kilometres west of Punt...

item.title: Preliminary Report on MP Johanna Ngeno Helicopter Crash to Be Released Within 30 Days
item.description: The preliminary report on the helicopter crash that claimed the life of Emurua Dikirr MP Johanna Ng’eno is expected within 30 days, Transport Cabinet Secretary Davis Chirchir has confirmed. The crash,...
